heading: Acceptance of donations by Secretary
label: 568 Acceptance of donations by Secretary
text: The Secretary of Labor is authorized to accept, in the name of the Department of Labor, and employ or dispose of in furtherance of authorized activities of the Department of Labor, during the fiscal year ending , and each fiscal year thereafter, any money or property, real, personal, or mixed, tangible or intangible, received by gift, devise, bequest, or otherwise.September 30, 1995
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in the following prior appropriation acts:, , .Pub. L. 103–112, title I, § 101107 Stat. 1089Oct. 21, 1993, , .Pub. L. 102–394, title I, § 105106 Stat. 1799Oct. 6, 1992
